settings.hero_subtext: Bundlora gives your store a dedicated builder page where shoppers mix and match their own bundle — with a discount that applies automatically at checkout. No code, no theme edits.
settings.hero_button_label: See it on a real store
settings.cta_heading: Give your shoppers a bundle to build.
settings.cta_text: Try a live builder the way your customers would — then bring one to your own store.
settings.cta_button_label: See it on a real store
